completed.note: Canada controlled the match and got a clean sheet to advance.
Huge upset. Germany dominated possession but couldn't break through. Paraguay held firm and won the shootout 4-3.
Morocco's defensive solidity frustrated the Dutch. Ismael Saibari scored the decisive penalty as Morocco advanced 3-2 on pens.
Gabriel Martinelli scored a last-minute winner for Brazil, making World Cup history as Japan were agonizingly close to an upset.
France dominated from start to finish. Comfortable 3-0 win, never in doubt.
Norway edged a tight contest 2-1 in regular time. Close game as predicted.
Mexico's home advantage at Estadio Azteca proved decisive. Clean 2-0 win.
England trailed 0-1 and struggled badly before Harry Kane scored a late brace to complete a dramatic comeback. DR Congo's goalkeeper Mpasi was heroic.
USA's first World Cup knockout win since 2002. Won 2-0 despite playing 30+ minutes with 10 men after Balogun's red card. Tillman's free kick sealed it.
Incredible comeback. Belgium were 2-0 down in the 85th minute, scored twice in 3 minutes to force extra time, then Tielemans converted a 125th-minute penalty — the latest goal in World Cup history.
Cristiano Ronaldo equalized, Goncalo Ramos scored the winner. Croatia had a last-gasp equalizer denied by VAR. Drama in Toronto.
Spain cruised through. Mikel Oyarzabal scored twice as Spain extended their unbeaten run to 34 games. First World Cup knockout win since 2010.
Switzerland's first knockout victory since 1938. Embolo and Ndoye scored in a professional, dominant display in Vancouver.
Argentina survived a scare. Cape Verde pushed them all the way in Miami but Argentina's quality prevailed 3-2.
Egypt won on penalties 4-2 after a 1-1 draw. Another penalty shootout drama in Arlington.
